data.title: Hyliion Holdings Schedules Q1 2026 Financial Results Conference Call and Webcast for May 13, 2026
data.description: Hyliion Holdings Corp., a company specializing in modular power plant technology, will be conducting a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT / 11:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this event is to discuss the financial results for Q1 2026, as well as provide insights into the company's business operations and future outlook. The Q1 2026 financial results will be released after the market closes on Tuesday, May 12, 2026. This conference call is a key opportunity for investors and stakeholders to gain valuable information directly from Hyliion.

data.title: Liberty Defense Appoints Seasoned Capital Markets Executive Will Hamilton to its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Wilmington, Massachusetts, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. revealed that Will Hamilton was appointed to its Board of Directors. Liberty, operating under the stock symbols Nasdaq: DETX and TSXV: SCAN, specializes in AI-powered detection solutions for hidden weapons and threats. This addition strengthens the company's leadership team and strategic direction.

data.title: WareSpace to Convert Vacant Seattle-Area Warehouse into Flexible Hub for Small Businesses
data.description: Renton's recent acquisition signifies WareSpace's expansion into the Pacific Northwest, providing small-bay warehouse solutions in a tightly regulated market. On April 29, 2026, the national warehouse operator secured a vacant industrial building. This move adds to Renton's burgeoning industrial landscape, contributing new options for businesses seeking modern warehouse facilities. WareSpace's entry into the region demonstrates a strategic approach to meeting the rising demand for small-bay storage solutions.

data.title: Klarna to Publish Q1 2026 Earnings on May 14, 2026
data.description: In New York, Klarna, a worldwide digital bank and provider of flexible payments, is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings report on Thursday, May 14, 2026, before the market opens. The information will be accessible on the investor relations website at investors.klarna.com. At 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day, Klarna will conduct an earnings webcast to analyze the financial outcomes. Interested parties, including shareholders, can sign up to join the webcast. A playback will also be offered on the investor relations site post the webcast.

data.title: The Dyrt Finds That Spouses and Dogs are Most Common Camping Companions
data.description: In April 29, 2026, a report released by The Dyrt, a popular camping app created by the largest RVing and camping community in the U.S., revealed that in 2025, almost half of campers (49.7%) camped with dogs, making them the most popular choice of pet. This statistic significantly surpassed the participation of other types of pets. The data sheds light on the commonality of dog companionship among campers in the U.S.

data.title: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Waxhaw, North Carolina Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services
data.description: San Diego, April 29, 2026 - Annex Brands, Inc., a top franchisor in packing, shipping, and office services, is backing local entrepreneurs to maintain vital shipping and office assistance. The company recently facilitated a successful transfer...

data.title: Curate Expands Into Detroit with Six New Restaurant Partnerships and Backing from Lions Wide Receiver, Amon-Ra St. Brown
data.description: Curate Technologies, a prominent first-party ordering and growth platform for restaurants, has achieved a significant advancement by further establishing its foothold in the Midwest dining industry. The news was disclosed in Los Angeles on April 29, 2026. This expansion marks a major growth milestone for the hospitality tech platform as it seeks to solidify its position in the region.

data.title: Leanpath Announces 200 Million Pounds of Food Waste Prevented in Global Foodservice Operations
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Beaverton, Oregon, Leanpath, a prominent company in food waste management for foodservice businesses, revealed that its group of partners has successfully averted 200 million pounds (equivalent to over 90 million kilograms) of food from being wasted. This significant achievement showcases the impactful efforts made by Leanpath and its network in reducing food waste within the industry.

data.title: Coalition of Veterinarians, Scientists, and Health Care Professionals Launches the "Save Science Oregon" Campaign to Prevent Closure of the Oregon National Primate Research Center (ONPRC)
data.description: In Beaverton, Oregon on April 29, 2026, Oregon Voices for Biomedical Research (OVBR), a nonprofit organization comprised of veterinarians, scientists, healthcare professionals, and Oregon residents, has initiated a campaign to safeguard the Oregon National Primate Research Center (ONPRC).

data.title: BetaNXT to Support Vanguard Investor Choice Program
data.description: A new pass-through voting solution created in collaboration with Tumelo streamlines the proxy voting procedure for investors in select Vanguard funds. This innovation is aimed at simplifying the voting process for shareholders. BetaNXT, a prominent provider of real-time wealth management technology solutions, introduced this development in New York on April 29, 2026. The partnership's goal is to enhance transparency and efficiency in the voting system.

data.title: Granite Publishes Annual Sustainability Report
data.description: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE:GVA) released its 2025 Sustainability Report on April 29, emphasizing its commitment to creating lasting value through social responsibility, environmental stewardship, and reliable governance. The company, under President and CEO Kyle Larkin, aims to deliver infrastructure solutions that bolster prosperous and resilient communities. Sustainability remains a focal point in this mission.

data.title: Mike Mayhall's Award-Winning Indie Series "The Madness of David Judge" Enters Emmy® Consideration With a Grassroots Campaign
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in New Orleans, a Louisiana-gothic thriller titled The Madness of David Judge was created by a core team of five individuals led by Emmy®-nominated writer/director Mike Mayhall. This immersive film delves into themes of love, betrayal, and the supernatural, offering viewers a glimpse into a fragmented reality.

data.title: MITER Foundation Partners with Woody Williams Foundation on Gold Star Families Memorial Monument Dedication on Pennsylvania State Capitol Grounds
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, MITER Foundation, the charitable branch of MITER Brands, collaborated with the Woody Williams Foundation for the unveiling event of the Gold Star Families Memorial Monument. This ceremony took place at the Pennsylvania State Capitol Grounds. The monument, composed of two-sided black granite, is a part of the Woody Williams Foundation's continuous efforts to honor Gold Star families. The monument dedication signifies a significant partnership between MITER Foundation, representing a prominent window and door brands family, and the Woody Williams Foundation.

data.title: Reported vulnerability in ZetaChain's system, worth $334K, was disregarded despite being reported through bug bounty program.
data.description: A critical security flaw in ZetaChain led to an exploit of $334,000. This vulnerability was previously reported through the bug bounty program but was ignored.

data.title: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. Named to KBW's Bank Honor Roll for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Jericho, New York, Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESQ), the financial holding firm for Esquire Bank, National Association, disclosed its participation in the Keefe, Bruyette index. The Company, responsible for Esquire Bank, shared this update.
